scenes.title: The River Bank
scenes.background_prompt: A wide river with clear water, a muddy bank with rocks, tall green reeds growing along the edge, and a large flat rock near the water. Pine trees in the background. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A wide river with clear, flowing water where silver fish leap above the surface, their scales catching the light. A large brown bear with thick fur stands at the muddy edge of the river bank, facing left. The bear leans forward, one massive paw extended toward the water as if about to swat at a jumping fish. A small blue bird with a white belly perches on a large flat gray rock near the water's edge to the right, watching the scene calmly. Tall green reeds and cattails grow in dense clusters along the bank. Pine trees with dark green needles line the far bank of the river. Smooth river stones are scattered along the muddy shore.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place bear at the muddy edge of the river bank (left), standing and facing left, leaning forward with one paw extended toward the water where fish jump. Place bird on the large flat rock near the water (right), perched and watching calmly.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, a patch of green grass is filled with small white, yellow, and purple flowers. Moving right along the bottom edge, a brown dirt path follows the shoreline of a blue river. On the left side of the scene, a large brown bear stands on the dirt bank, facing right. The bear has thick brown fur and is positioned on all fours, with its front left paw slightly raised over a small grey stone in the water. In the center, three silver fish are leaping out of the blue water in front of a cluster of tall green reeds. One fish is high in the air, another is slightly lower to the left, and the third is near the bottom right of the group. To the right of the reeds, a large, flat, brownish-grey rock sits on the dirt bank. A small blue bird is perched on top of this rock, facing left toward the bear. Behind the rock and extending to the right edge of the image is a green meadow dotted with white, yellow, and purple flowers. In the background, a dense forest of stylized evergreen trees with brown trunks and green needles spans the horizon. Above the forest, the sky is a light blue color with several soft, rounded white and pale yellow clouds. The lighting is bright and even, suggesting a clear day in a peaceful wilderness setting.

CH: large brown bear with thick fur
small blue bird with bright feathers
three silver fish leaping from water

blue river flowing through the woods
bright sky with soft white clouds

bear reaching out with its front paw

bird watching the bear with curiosity

bird waiting to see what happens next
A: bear standing on the muddy bank
fish leaping high into the air
bird sitting still on a flat rock
CO: bear might catch a tasty meal
fish escaping back into the deep river

small blue bird with bright feathers
